title: Advances in Renewable Energy
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: The (0) global transition to renewable energy is accelerating. Recent (17) in solar panel technology have made it more cost-effective. This has led to an (18) increase in the number of households adopting green energy. || Governments are providing (19) to encourage the (20) of fossil fuels with cleaner alternatives. Scientists are also working on the (21) of energy storage systems to ensure a (22) supply of electricity. The (23) of these technologies is (24) for meeting climate targets by 2050.

questions.explanation: Plural compound noun meaning important discoveries.
Adjective with negative prefix meaning never done before.
Plural noun meaning things that motivate or encourage.
Noun describing the act of substituting one thing for another.
Noun meaning the action of making the best use of a resource.
Adjective meaning consistently good in quality or performance.
Gerund/Noun meaning the action of making something wider in scope.
